name: Scenic

unions.name: LayoutState
unions.comment: Internal representation, only exposed so you can write any required program signatures on your main module

unions.name: Outcome
unions.comment: Describe what Scenic should do to your layout after an update

unions.name: Transition
unions.comment: Possible transitions that you can use when the outcome of an update is ChangePage

aliases.name: ProgramWithFlags
aliases.comment: This is the Type describing what Sceninc expects to build a managed program. Currently only a wrapper for a program with flags exists since SPA usually need access to LocalStorage so this is how you'd pass the initial data to boot.
aliases.type: { init : flags -> Location -> ( page, Cmd msg, Outcome page ), update : msg -> page -> ( page, Cmd msg, Outcome page ), subscriptions : page -> Sub msg, view : page -> Html msg, pageToUrl : page -> String, parseLocation : Location -> page }

values.name: programWithFlags
values.comment: use this to build a Scenic managed program.
values.type: ProgramWithFlags flags msg page -> Program flags (LayoutState page) (Msg page msg)
